## Checklist

- [ ] SKILL.md has valid frontmatter (name, description, license, metadata)
- [ ] Skill registered in `bundle-loader.md`, `CAPABILITIES.md`, `skill-registry.md`
- [ ] `make test-scripts` passes
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or personal data
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits format
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` AI attribution lines
